page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i5ge.48xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 192 dedicated physical cores and 192 vCPUs using Intel Xeon 6982P-C processors operating at a clock speed of 3.2 GHz. The hardware configuration allocates 1152.0 GB of system memory, providing a ratio of 6.0 GB of RAM per core.

A defining characteristic of this instance is its substantial local storage capacity, which includes 30717 GB of bundled SSD storage. This local storage is complemented by a high-speed network interface delivering a baseline bandwidth of 190 Gbps. The instance does not include any GPU accelerators.

Given the high density of dedicated compute cores, massive local SSD capacity, and high network throughput, this instance offers qualitative resource density for large-scale deployments. It is designed for I/O-intensive workloads, large relational or non-relational databases, distributed file systems, and high-throughput data processing applications that require low-latency access to massive local storage volumes.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i5ge.48xlarge is a high-capacity, storage-optimized server instance built on the x86_64 architecture and managed via the KVM hypervisor. It is equipped with 192 dedicated Intel Xeon 6982P-C physical cores operating at 3.2 GHz, alongside 1152.0 GB of system memory. The instance features a massive 30717 GB of local SSD storage and a baseline network bandwidth of 190 Gbps, with no GPU acceleration. This hardware profile makes the instance highly suitable for large-scale databases, distributed storage systems, and data-intensive enterprise applications requiring substantial local storage capacity and high network throughput.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i5ge.48xlarge is a storage-optimized server featuring 192 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 1152 GB RAM, 30717 GB of local SSD storage, and 190 Gbps baseline network bandwidth.

tagline: A high-capacity storage and compute platform featuring massive local SSD capacity, dedicated Intel Xeon cores, and high-speed networking.

1152.0 GB of system memory providing 6.0 GB of RAM per core
